'''Razorts''' were aquatic creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]]. [[Otter/Legends|Otter]]-like, razorts had a fearsome look and a vicious nature. It was a fast predator, possessing long fangs and a [[razor-tail]], along with [[Armor/Legends|armored]] joints. The [[Sedrian]] [[Karak]] managed to tame one, naming it [[Tooch]].<ref name="BGS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]'' {{1st}}
